sections.title: Starting out
Entering the cave before starting the quest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think I want to disturb a cave of giants right now...

sections.title: Talking to Kovac

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You don't want to fight me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I must be dreaming. Giants can't talk!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay giant, I'll help you out, but first you need to tell me your name... if you even have one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Kovac... alright then. My name is [player name]. So, Kovac, what do you need help with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hang on... is this a trick? Are you going to cook and eat me?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How? Giants don't build, do they? I thought they were brutes...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Huh? I don't understand what you mean.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You want me to help you by fixing those tools?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll help, but first you need to tell me what this place was used for?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's incredible! But why do you want to make weapons? Most giants I've come across already have weapons?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. To be honest, if I hadn't seen this place myself, I wouldn't have believed you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright, Kovac, I'll help you out. What do we need to do first?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No way! I'm getting out of here. There's no chance I'd trust a giant!

sections.title: What is this? A workshop for giants?
Talking to Kovac
Inspecting objects
Big chest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Kovac, where did you get this chest from?

sections.title: Crate

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you keep in this box?

sections.title: Crucible

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can see that, but what's it used for?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac need think about it more.

sections.title: Lava pool

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Having all this lava here without a barrier is quite dangerous.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Should we try building something to keep us safe?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Just no swim in the hot juice.

sections.title: Mould jig

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this table used for, Kovac?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: look like we put thing on it.

sections.title: Preform storage

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This looks a little dangerous. Quite a perilous place to store something.

sections.title: Waterfall

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not everyday you see a waterfall in a cave.

sections.title: Reparing the trip hammer

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think this has seen better days. What was it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right... and what did it do?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let me take a look and see if I can fix it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That looks like it'll do the trick. What do you think?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac think Kovac figure it out.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Water spin wheel and raise hammer.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Hammer fall and crump sword into shape.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That makes sense. Quite resourceful for giants to make something water powered.

sections.title: Reparing the grindstone

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What was this meant to be?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac think it was for grinnin... grinding.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. It looks like it's lost its teeth.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Conquer? It's already broken! Hitting it more won't help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right... now we're agreed, I'll see what I can do to fix it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well that required a bit of elbow grease. It should be good to go now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Didn't want to try and help me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me what this is used for then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So we use it when making swords?

sections.title: Reparing the polishing wheel

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, what is this thing? It just looks like a wheel to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Looks like it's lost its soft edge then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not my finest work, but I think it will do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So when would we use the polishing wheel?

sections.title: Talking to Kovac after all the tools are repaired

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's all the tools repaired. Well... as best as I can do.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac begin to understand more now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've noticed your speech has been improving over time as well.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: but sometime hard say proppel... properly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's alright, we'll figure it out together.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac agree. Ready to make sword?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes! I'm itching to get started.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac get few things ready first...

sections.title: Make-A-Sword
Talking to Kovac

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay Kovac, I think I'm ready to make a sword.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac feel like things look correct...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what do I need to do to make a sword?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: you will need a coliti... commission.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can I get one of those?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac already gotten one from old friend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, so what do I need to make?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac need a Flat Broad sword.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac think we need to fill the...

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac think we need to fill the crucible with metal first.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac has been connecti... collecting metals...

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: They're in that box-crate by entry.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Load metals into crucible until it looks full.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac think about next thing we need to do.

sections.title: Searching crate
Talking to Kovac after looting the crate

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright, I've got the metal you said to take from the box. What now?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: You will need to fill the crucible...

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Add metals, armour or weapon you find to fill it.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: We stick to bronze and iron for this sword...

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: We keep the first sword simple.

sections.title: Talking to Kovac after partially filling the crucible

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've added a few things to the crucible. Is that enough?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: 28 metal bars worth. Weapon and armour can go into crucible too but some metal lost when melted down.

sections.title: Talking to Kovac after filling the crucible

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, that's the crucible full. Can I make the sword yet?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac think we need to set up a mould.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac think mould will determine the type of sword to be made.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Remember, we need a Flat Broad sword.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, so how do I go about setting up a mould?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac remember being told a sword is made from three parts...

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: a forte, a blade and a tip.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: You can select part for each selecti... section.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: They will suit different commissions better...

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Look for parts that match commission.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right... I think I'm with you.

sections.title: Talking to Kovac before setting the mould

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry Kovac, but I'm not entirely sure what I'm meant to be doing.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac not so sure of himself...

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: but you help Kovac, so Kovac help you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks Kovac. You're gentle for a giant.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what was it I needed to do at the mould jig?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: We need to fill each part of the mould...

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: We want to use mould parts that match collisi... commission Kovac give you.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Remember, each part suit a differing sword better...

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Look for ones that match Flat and Broad.

sections.title: Talking to Kovac after setting the mould

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, the mould is setup and the crucible is full to the brim. We must be ready to pour.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Well done little one. We are ready.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Pour the metal from the crucible into the mould...

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac will tell how to work the preform.

sections.title: Before picking up the preform

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The metal's too hot to pick up!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, of course... How do I do that?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac do not know. Try pouring water on it.

sections.title: Talk to Kovac after using a bucket of water

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not sure what to do next...

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: take the preform and put it in your hand. Then come see Kovac for help.

sections.title: Trying to pick up the preform before cooling it
Trying to pick up the preform with a weapon or shield equipped
After picking up the preform

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay Kovac, I've got this huge burning hot sword. What do I do with it?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Use tools around the foundry to reclin... refine the preform.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I know which tool I need to use?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac not too sure. Kovac's gut feeling says use trip hammer first.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: The preform needs to be within a certain heat range to work properly.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: If you use the wrong tool...

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: or tool at wrong heat, we damage the preform quality.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: A sword with low quality is bad...

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Means less giants will want it, so Kovac give less for it.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: If you damage a preform too much, it will become junk and Kovac will have to throw it away...

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: but this first attent... attempt, so do not worry about quality too much.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: You use trip hammer first. Trip hammer need preform to be quite hot.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: If the preform at wrong temperature...

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: You can hot it up by dunking it in lava or cold it by holding it to waterfall.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright, I'll give it a go.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Remember, try trip hammer first with hot preform.

sections.title: Before completing the use of the trip hammer

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not sure which tool I need to use next.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Hmm... you need to use the trip hammer.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Make sure preform is nice and hot...

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Trip hammer needs a high temperature.

sections.title: Using a preform that is too cold on the trip hammer

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: The sword is too cold. We need to heat it up to use it on the trip hammer.

sections.title: Using a preform on the trip hammer after its been hammered enough

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Using wrong tool. We should be using the grindstone.

sections.title: Using a preform that has not been completely hammered on the grindstone or polishing wheel

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Using wrong tool. We should be using the trip hammer.

sections.title: Talking to him after hammering the preform enough

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not sure which tool I need to use next.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: time to move over to the grindstone.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: The preform need to be warm...

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Fictio... friction from grindstone will heat the preform up as well.

sections.title: Using a preform that is too hot on the grindstone

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: The sword is too hot. We need to cool it down to use it on the grindstone.

sections.title: Using a preform that is too cold on the grindstone

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: The sword is too cold. We need to heat it up to use it on the grindstone.

sections.title: Using a preform on the grindstone after its been ground enough

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Using wrong tool. We should be using the polishing wheel.

sections.title: Using a preform that has not been completely ground on the grindstone on the polishing wheel

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Using wrong tool. We should be using the grindstone.

sections.title: Talking to him after hammering the preform enough

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not sure which tool I need to use next.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: You just need to use polishing wheel to finish preform off.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Preform need to be quite cool to work with polishing wheel.

sections.title: Using a preform that is too hot on the polishing wheel

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: The sword is too hot. We need to cool it down to use it on the polishing wheel.

sections.title: Using a preform that is too cold on the polishing wheel

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: The sword is too cold. We need to heat it up to use it on the polishing wheel.

sections.title: After polishing it enough

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Looks like the sword is finished. I should take it to Kovac.

sections.title: Using the finished sword on any tool after its finished

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Looks like the sword is finished. I should take it to Kovac.

sections.title: Attempting to fill the crucible before handing in the preform

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I should finish helping Kovac before I try making another sword.

sections.title: Handing in the sword

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay Kovac, I think I've finally finished the sword!

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: This is defeanin... definitely a sword...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry it's not very good. I'm still getting use to everything.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: That is okay. You do better than Kovac could...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what do we do with it now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great! So what do we do with it now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Out of curiosity, who is this first blade for?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Obor? Can't say I've heard of them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Obor? He's just going to use it to kill me!

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Obor good friend. Kovac know he only attack if you trespass his cave...

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Maybe you should have some manners and knock first.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, you're not wrong there... I normally just let myself in.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac think Obor show other giants how strong our swords are. Then every giant want one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's a pretty clever marketing plan, I must admit.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac know what he do sometime... Thank you for help, [player name]. You free to use foundry whenever you want.
